_metadata.title: ComplianceLint Interim Standard for EU AI Act Article 26: Obligations of Deployers
_metadata.disclaimer: This is an interim standard developed by ComplianceLint. It will be superseded when CEN-CENELEC publishes the harmonized standard for deployer obligations.
basis: EU AI Act Recitals 91-93 (legislative intent on deployer obligations)
GDPR Articles 35, 36 -- Data protection impact assessment
_metadata.awaiting_standard: CEN-CENELEC harmonized standard for deployer obligations (expected Q4 2026)

requirements.title: Deployment Documentation
requirements.requirement: The deployer MUST maintain documentation demonstrating that the high-risk AI system is used in accordance with the provider's instructions for use.
requirements.rationale: Art. 26(1) requires use per instructions. Documentation provides evidence of compliance.
required_content: Reference to provider's instructions for use
Escalation procedures for anomalies or risks

requirements.title: Human Oversight Assignment
requirements.requirement: The deployer MUST assign human oversight to identified natural persons with documented competence, training, authority, and support.
requirements.rationale: Art. 26(2) requires oversight by competent persons. Assignment must be documented.
required_content: Competency requirements and evidence of training
Authority scope (what they can override or stop)

requirements.title: Operational Monitoring
requirements.requirement: The deployer MUST monitor the operation of the high-risk AI system and have procedures to inform the provider of identified risks.
requirements.rationale: Art. 26(5) requires monitoring per instructions and risk communication to providers.
acceptable_implementations: Monitoring dashboards with AI system health metrics
Regular performance reviews against provider specifications
Provider communication channel for risk reporting

requirements.title: Log Retention
requirements.requirement: The deployer MUST retain automatically generated AI system logs for at least six months.
requirements.rationale: Art. 26(6) mandates minimum 6-month log retention for deployers.
acceptable_implementations: Log storage with configured retention >= 180 days
Cloud logging service with retention policy
Log archive system with documented retention period

requirements.title: Affected Person Notification
requirements.requirement: The deployer MUST inform natural persons that they are subject to a high-risk AI system when it makes or assists in decisions about them.
requirements.rationale: Art. 26(11) requires transparency to affected persons.
acceptable_implementations: Clear AI disclosure in user-facing interfaces
Terms of service with AI usage disclosure
Physical signage for in-person AI systems

scoring.compliant: R01 + R02 + R03 + R04 + R05 all met
